title: ImUi Table Sortable Diagnostics Gate v1
problem: Promote the runnable app-owned sortable inspector table proof from source-marker coverage to a deterministic diagnostics script without reopening the closed sortable header API or demo-proof lanes.

repro.summary: Launch `imui_shadcn_adapter_demo`, run the sortable inspector table script, and verify that the first header exposes ascending state, receives a stable click, then exposes descending state.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-shadcn-adapter-sortable-table-gate.json --dir target/fret-diag/imui-table-sortable-diag-gate-v1 --session-auto --timeout-ms 240000 --exit-after-run --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_shadcn_adapter_demo

gates.name: launched-diag
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-shadcn-adapter-sortable-table-gate.json --dir target/fret-diag/imui-table-sortable-diag-gate-v1 --session-auto --timeout-ms 240000 --exit-after-run --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_shadcn_adapter_demo

continue_policy.notes: Keep this lane active until the launched diagnostics command has produced a passing run. Do not widen into a row sorting engine, multi-sort policy, column resize, or persistence.
